column1: # NIST NSRL — Real Windows 10/11 System File Hashes (CSV Format)
# Source: NIST National Software Reference Library RDS 2.79+

# Description: Actual MD5 hashes of legitimate Windows system files from the NIST NSRL Reference Data Set. These are verified clean operating system binaries that should be EXCLUDED from forensic analysis. Matching these files means the file is a standard Windows component
